# godot-mcp ‚Äî Full Reference

## Architecture

Godot MCP is a FastMCP 3.2 server on FastAPI with dual transport: stdio for MCP clients and HTTP SSE on port 10993. It communicates with a running Godot 4.0 editor/headless build via WebSocket bridge (port 9080). The server also hosts REST APIs for itch.io, Steam, fleet exchange, game builder, and artifact depot.

### Pipeline

```
blender-mcp ‚Üí GLB/OBJ ‚Üí godot_import_glb ‚Üí Godot scene
qcad-mcp ‚Üí freecad-mcp ‚Üí FluidX3D ‚Üí CSV velocity ‚Üí godot_load_velocity_field ‚Üí godot_spawn_particles
design_game ‚Üí generate_game_worlds (worldlabs) ‚Üí compose_game_scene ‚Üí generate_game_logic ‚Üí export_and_ship
```

## Tools ‚Äî Full Reference

### Engine Control

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `godot_status` | Engine version, node count, FPS, bridge state |
| `godot_read_scene_tree` | Dump full scene hierarchy as JSON |
| `godot_headless_verify` | Check headless mode + CLI command |
| `godot_set_config` | Write to project.godot INI-style config |

### 3D Import

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `godot_import_stl` | Binary STL ‚Üí MeshInstance3D with ArrayMesh |
| `godot_import_glb` | GLB/GLTF ‚Üí nodes/meshes via GLTFDocument |
| `godot_import_obj` | Wavefront OBJ ‚Üí imported mesh via ResourceLoader |

### Scene Editing

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `godot_create_camera` | Camera3D with orbit controls (GDScript) |
| `godot_add_light` | Directional/ambient/omni light |
| `godot_set_material` | StandardMaterial3D PBR (albedo, roughness) |
| `godot_spawn_particles` | GPUParticles3D system with configurable emission box |
| `godot_load_velocity_field` | Load CSV velocity data (x,y,z,vx,vy,vz) as node metadata |
| `godot_animate_streamlines` | Animate GPU particles along velocity field vectors |
| `godot_export_web` | HTML5/WebAssembly export via headless or in-editor |
| `godot_play_animation` | List/play GLB animation clips via AnimationPlayer |

### Itch.io Publishing

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `itch_status` | Butler install, API key, default slug |
| `godot_export_release` | Export sample/custom project (web/windows) |
| `itch_push_preview` | Diff NEW/MODIFIED/DELETED before push |
| `itch_push` | Upload build via Butler |
| `itch_latest_version` | Query api.itch.io/wharf for newest build |
| `ship_to_itch` | Full pipeline: export ‚Üí preview ‚Üí push |

### Steam Publishing

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `steam_status` | SteamPipe/steamcmd readiness, app/depot IDs |
| `steam_checklist` | Steam Direct release checklist |
| `steam_monetization_guide` | Pricing and revenue guidance |
| `steam_stage_build` | Export Windows ‚Üí fleet exchange for SteamPipe |
| `ship_to_steam_prerelease` | Upload to beta branch (dry_run=true default) |
| `ship_to_steam_release` | Upload to live branch (dry_run=true default) |
| `ship_to_steam` | End-to-end Steam ship pipeline |

### Game Builder Pipeline

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `design_game` | Natural language ‚Üí GamePlan (worlds, scenes, scripts) |
| `generate_game_worlds` | Marble world generation + collider GLB staging |
| `compose_game_scene` | Assemble Godot scene from GamePlan + worlds |
| `generate_game_logic` | Generate GDScript files from GamePlan |
| `export_and_ship` | Export + itch.io push in one call |
| `build_game` | End-to-end: design ‚Üí worlds ‚Üí compose ‚Üí logic ‚Üí ship |

### Fleet Integration

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `fleet_exchange_status` | Depot assets and pipeline readiness |
| `fleet_import_from_exchange` | Import GLB/OBJ/STL from fleet exchange |
| `fleet_worldlabs_get_world` | Fetch Marble world asset URLs |
| `fleet_worldlabs_stage_mesh` | Download Chisel collision GLB to exchange |
| `fleet_worldlabs_stage_splat` | Download SPZ splat to exchange |
| `fleet_worldlabs_import_mesh` | Download + import Marble GLB into Godot |

### Sampling / Agentic

| Tool | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `ai_describe_artifact` | AI description for scene/mesh/material |
| `ai_generate_gdscript` | GDScript generation from natural language |
| `cad_sampling` | Multi-step CAD reasoning via LLM |

## Config

### Env Vars
- `GODOT_PATH` ‚Äî Path to godot.exe (auto-detect if omitted)
- `GODOT_HOST` / `GODOT_PORT` ‚Äî TCP bridge (default 127.0.0.1:9080)
- `BUTLER_API_KEY` ‚Äî itch.io Butler API key
- `ITCH_TARGET` ‚Äî Default user/game slug
- `STEAM_APP_ID` / `STEAM_DEPOT_ID` ‚Äî Steam app configuration
- `STEAM_USERNAME` / `STEAMCMD_PATH` ‚Äî Steam Pipe credentials
- `MCP_BRIDGE_URLS` ‚Äî Comma-separated peer MCP servers

### Ports
- 10993 ‚Äî Backend (REST + MCP SSE)
- 10992 ‚Äî Frontend (Vite dev, React dashboard)
- 9080 ‚Äî Godot TCP bridge
- 11020 ‚Äî steam-mcp (fleet standard)

## Error Handling

All tools return `{"success": bool, "data": {...}}`. Bridge connection failures return "Cannot connect to Godot" + instructions. Sampling tools gracefully degrade when ctx.sample() unavailable.

## Cross-repo Integration

- **freecad-mcp** ‚Äî CAD/BIM geometry ‚Üí STL import
- **qcad-mcp** ‚Äî DXF floor plan ‚Üí STL extrusion ‚Üí import
- **fluidx3d (via freecad-mcp)** ‚Äî GPU CFD velocity fields ‚Üí visualization
- **blender-mcp** ‚Äî GLB/VRM export ‚Üí godot_import_glb
- **worldlabs-mcp** ‚Äî Marble 3D worlds ‚Üí game builder pipeline
- **steam-mcp** ‚Äî SteamPipe upload bridge
